summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RiftMarket iteration 3 - all major features working correctly including Roblox username validation, checkout flow, proofs page, footer pages, and order confirmation with confetti
passed_tests: Backend API tests (30/30 passed - 100% success rate)
Header navigation with all required elements (Home, Games, Proofs+LIVE badge, Tutorial, Discord)
Brand logo navigation from game pages to home
Checkout page Roblox username validation (shows verified user with avatar)
Checkout page email validation with visual feedback
Complete order flow with confetti animation
Order confirmation page with order number and Discord link
All footer pages loading (Proofs, How It Works with 6 steps, About, Privacy, Terms, Refund)
Cart sidebar and 'Proceed to Checkout' functionality
Place Order button state management (disabled until all fields valid)
